rationale: No existing E2E test covers the FTS default-column auto-pick behavior. The diff updates existing tests (logstable, indexquery, logsquickmode) for compatibility with the FTS feature — they no longer assume the 'source' column is always present — but none exercise the feature's workflows (auto-pick on search, user-override clearing, SQL-mode exclusion, reset re-resolution, close-then-rerun). A dedicated spec is warranted. playwright.config.js auto-discovers specs under playwright-tests/, so no registration needed.
